sentences.arabic: لَمْ يَعُدِ التَّعَلُّمُ مَحْصُورًا فِي سِنٍّ مُعَيَّنَةٍ، بَلْ أَصْبَحَ مَفْهُومُ التَّعَلُّمِ مَدَى الْحَيَاةِ رُكْنًا أَسَاسِيًّا لِلنَّجَاحِ.
sentences.translation: Učenje više nije ograničeno na određenu dob, već je koncept cjeloživotnog učenja postao osnovni stub uspjeha.
sentences.translationEn: Learning is no longer confined to a certain age; rather, the concept of lifelong learning has become a fundamental pillar of success.

sentences.arabic: تُوَفِّرُ الْمِنَصَّاتُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ الْحَدِيثَةُ فُرَصًا لَا مَثِيلَ لَهَا لِاكْتِسَابِ مَهَارَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ مِنْ رَاحَةِ الْمَنْزِلِ.
sentences.translation: Savremene digitalne platforme pružaju neviđene prilike za sticanje novih vještina iz udobnosti doma.
sentences.translationEn: Modern digital platforms provide unparalleled opportunities to acquire new skills from the comfort of one's home.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ عَلَى الْفَرْدِ أَنْ يَتَحَلَّى بِالْفُضُولِ الْمَعْرِفِيِّ لِيُوَاكِبَ التَّطَوُّرَاتِ الْمُتَسَارِعَةَ فِي سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Pojedinac mora posjedovati kognitivnu radoznalost kako bi išao u korak s brzim promjenama na tržištu rada.
sentences.translationEn: An individual must possess cognitive curiosity to keep pace with the rapid developments in the labor market.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاسْتِثْمَارَ فِي الذَّاتِ عَبْرَ الْقِرَاءَةِ وَالدَّوْرَاتِ التَّدْرِيبِيَّةِ هُوَ الضَّمَانُ الْوَحِيدُ لِلتَّقَدُّمِ الْمِهْنِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Investiranje u sebe kroz čitanje i obuke jedina je garancija za profesionalni napredak.
sentences.translationEn: Investing in oneself through reading and training courses is the only guarantee for professional advancement.

sentences.arabic: وَبِذٰلِكَ، يَبْقَى الْعَقْلُ مُتَيَقِّظًا وَمُبْدِعًا مَهْمَا تَقَدَّمَ بِالْإِنْسَانِ الْعُمْرُ.
sentences.translation: Tako um ostaje budan i kreativan bez obzira na to koliko čovjek stari.
sentences.translationEn: In this way, the mind remains alert and creative no matter how old a person gets.
